meaning: n.[宗] 瓦实提(基督教<<圣经·旧约>>中波斯国王Ahasuerus之妻)
examples: Vashti even made a dot by NOT painting a dot.
Vashti I even made a dot by NOT painting a dot.
The art class was over, but Vashti sat glued to her chair.
Mr. VASHTI ONO (Kurdish resident of Turkey): (Through Translator) I dove behind crates of vegetables until the shooting stopped.
Ms. VASHTI BUNYAN: (Singing) Just another diamond day, just a blade of grass, just another bale of hay where the horses pass.
